title: SipRequest ActionHook Payload
description: Payload sent to the sip-request verb's actionHook after a SIP request (e.g. INFO, NOTIFY) is sent and a response is received.

result.description: Whether the SIP request succeeded or failed.

sip_status.description: SIP response status code. Present when result is 'success'.

err.description: Error message. Present when result is 'failed'.
